raw_response: analysisWe need pick one player to vote. Based on discussion, many claim Shane is werewolf. But Shane says he was robber and swapped with Eric. If true, Eric would be werewolf. But Eric claims he was werewolf originally. Confusing. Likely Shane is lying. Many accuse Shane. So vote Shane.assistantfinal{"chosen_vote":"Shane","justification":"The majority of the discussion points to Shane as the suspect. He claims to have been the Robber and swapped with Eric, implying Eric was the Werewolf. However, Eric immediately counters that he was the Werewolf and that Shane’s swap would make Shane the Werewolf. The conflicting statements and the fact that Shane is the only one consistently accused of being a Werewolf lead the Village to target him. Voting Shane maximizes the chance of eliminating a Werewolf or at least a player who claims to be one."}
